prd.user_story: As a developer, I want to: Find all Go source files in etcd-io/etcd that implement MVCC compaction: the compaction schedule (periodic vs revision-based), the compaction of revision indices, the notification of watch streams that span a compacted revision, and the slow watch detection.
constraints: Provide specific file paths and repository names in your answer.
prd.success_definition: Agent successfully identifies relevant files and symbols across all repos in the multi-org-go fixture.
prd.seed_prompt: Find all Go source files in etcd-io/etcd that implement MVCC compaction: the compaction schedule (periodic vs revision-based), the compaction of revision indices, the notification of watch streams that span a compacted revision, and the slow watch detection.
